priority_scoring_path: claude-llm: 100% reproducible across Android/iOS/Web, core AI search result quality severely degraded, near-duplicate FLIPPI-2905 filed P0 (0.97 similarity), 4 of 5 similar historical bugs are P1
severity_justification: This is a 100%-reproducible search quality degradation affecting all platforms and all returning users, which constitutes core value-proposition damage to the AI shopping experience. FLIPPI-2905 is a near-identical ticket (0.97 similarity) filed at P0, and four other comparable dedup bugs (FLIPPI-1729, FLIPPI-2481, FLIPPI-1816, FLIPPI-1831) are all P1. No crash, checkout block, or security risk is present, so the strict P0 ladder criteria are not met — but the all-platform, 100%-repro scope and AI result quality damage clearly exceed P2.
owner_reason: Saumya Chauhan is the assignee of FLIPPI-2905, the near-duplicate ticket that covers the same product family dedup gap in journey continuation search, making her the natural owner for this follow-up report.
